scenarios.name: Layered Express rate limit with Redis sliding window
scenarios.rationale: Treatment implements the sorted-set sliding window with a Redis multi pipeline (zremrangebyscore, zadd, zcard, expire), composite keys per category, and the full X-RateLimit-Limit/Remaining/Reset plus Retry-After headers on 429; baseline drops in express-rate-limit with a fixed-window store and partially covers headers, missing the per-category keyGenerator and the exact algorithm.

scenarios.name: Credential-stuffing detection
scenarios.rationale: Treatment tracks unique usernames per IP using a Redis HyperLogLog and blocks the IP when the count exceeds 20 in a 5-minute window, with structured logging of request metadata for incident response; baseline counts failed attempts per IP fail2ban-style and does not distinguish unique usernames, missing the abuse pattern the rubric targets.
